groups.group: Customer project / IT / OT network team

questions.question: What are the device or gateway IP addresses, VLANs, and routing paths?
Which SNMP versions and security modes are approved at site?
What are the customer asset IDs, site, zone, and location mappings?
What is the exact bit order and byte order for the DTS4160 alarm OID?
Provide the full per-bit vendor mapping and polling/trap behavior.
Which actual access mode will be used for BRTL32?
Which BRTL36.mib objects are supported by BRTL32?
Provide trap samples and RF metric units/scales.
Provide exact child OIDs for CPU, traffic, port, terminal, sysMessage, and registrationInfo.
Provide Failure Message trap payload examples and severity mapping.
Will Vector provide any SNMP bridge, relay, NMS, or serial-over-IP gateway?
Who captures packet evidence and maintains OID-to-asset mapping?
Which EDGE connector mode is planned for each system?
What normalized event envelope fields are mandatory for site acceptance?
